title: June Group Request
description: Request body schema for the June Tracking API /group endpoint.

userId.description: The ID for this user in your database. At least one of userId or anonymousId must be provided.

anonymousId.description: An ID for the user when identity is unknown.

groupId.description: The identifier of the company or group.

traits.description: Group or company attributes such as name, address, or contact information.

name.description: The name of the group or company.

employees.description: Number of employees in the company.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 date-time when the group action occurred. Defaults to server time if omitted.

context.description: Extra context to attach to the call.
